base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of darknut_walk — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Darknut — armored knight. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Darknut — armored knight; 4-dir walk; front-shielded, must attack from side/behind. Red (weaker) + blue (stronger) variants
